title: An Act protecting children from addictive social media feeds

abstracts.abstract: By Representative MacGregor of Boston, a petition (subject to Joint Rule 12) of William F. MacGregor for legislation to regulate social media feeds.  Advanced Information Technology, the Internet and Cybersecurity.
